{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184037EF639088AEBF8993C48B"}"},"total":722},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535106060261704510","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，脱离小白文范畴了，剧情紧凑，但发展有些慢了，当然历史类小说可以写的详细些，希望在1500章到2000章以内吧，不要太监！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754407000,"group_id":"7436219904140774462","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个闲散的写手，多年老书虫。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2MP+dF05rHTaqBZ4IN/q08=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"60222599494","user_name":"知晓阡陌"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"60222599494","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436219904140774462","book_info":{"abstract":"综合格斗冠军一觉醒来，穿越成为水浒梁山一代头领白衣秀士王伦。
开局豹子头林冲上山，磨刀霍霍，正是对他颇为不满时，一个不好，就要被他搠死。
往后还有晁盖、吴用等强人上山，难道要重蹈王伦过去的悲惨命运？
要知道风浪越大，鱼越贵！
林冲而已，有勇而无大谋，拿捏便是！
晁盖要做寨主？我山中的小弟也不是吃素的！
至于黑脸宋江，我会让他知道花儿为啥这么红。
这宋末乱世，正是大展宏图之时，金兵南下，包围东京城，靖康之耻难道又要重现？
别慌！
我先登基称帝，杀穿金人，南征北战，一统天下！
凡日月所照，皆为汉土。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e8a9eb189f930704412570b3ebd05692","author":"优乐多","author_id":"","book_id":"7436219904140774462","book_name":"刀劈宋江，武松为我黄袍加身","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7436220142159151678","read_count":"22870","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2143759"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"1000","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,皇帝,宋朝,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/97a5ba0e92c3b76822fc8e23c4b1640a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446437&x-signature=ik9l3Doud3foQzxoEUI7%2BmsLNsU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"73954572882","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"676"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184037EF639088AEBF8993C48B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读27小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2 read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3771,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9948},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1752983317,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7547502079064343321","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部水浒传题材的穿越同人小说堪称近年网文界的创意佳作，作者巧妙地将现代思维与北宋末年乱世背景相融合，通过主角的穿越视角重构了梁山泊的势力发展轨迹。小说不仅保留了原著中林冲风雪山神庙、武松打虎等经典桥段，更以预知能力为金手指，让主角提前布局化解危机，这种"已知结局反推过程"的叙事手法极大增强了故事张力。","text_exts":[{"e":5,"s":2,"text":"水浒传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B0%B4%E6%B5%92%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742624378993C48B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227547502079064343321%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227436219904140774462%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B0%B4%E6%B5%92%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757294989,"group_id":"7436219904140774462","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyHHc/LG3D5L3ALXJudRcIdDAeWD3/l8MQMAq2SrWRQo","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ef5e3f74941f4a52b6f7f3df8fd88321~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796688&x-signature=SqRJKyW7GcsVb6FxZTMuP48kL5M%3D","user_id":"4127987265447479","user_name":"靈麟麡007"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4127987265447479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436219904140774462","book_info":{"abstract":"综合格斗冠军一觉醒来，穿
